title: BEM-531.3 workflow audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_3_workflow_audit_report.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_3_workflow_audit.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
archive = Path('governance/archive/bem531_3_workflow_audit_20260517')
archive.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

role_wf = Path('.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml')
provider_wf = Path('.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml')
role_wf.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Archive previous workflow versions if they exist.
for wf in [role_wf, provider_wf]:
    if wf.exists():
        dst = archive / str(wf)
        dst.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        dst.write_text(wf.read_text(errors='ignore'))
        changed_files.append(str(dst))

role_yaml = '''name: Role Orchestrator

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      cycle_id:
        description: Internal role cycle id
        required: true
        type: string
      source:
        description: gpt or claude; telegram is deferred for BEM-531
        required: true
        type: string
      next_role:
        description: curator, analyst, auditor, executor
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  orchestrate:
    name: Role Orchestrator curator-first
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Append role transport record
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          cycle_id = '${{ inputs.cycle_id }}'
          source = '${{ inputs.source }}'
          next_role = '${{ inputs.next_role }}'
          path = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
          path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
          record = {
            'record_type': 'role_orchestrator_dispatch',
            'cycle_id': cycle_id,
            'source': source,
            'from_role': 'curator',
            'to_role': next_role,
            'status': 'completed',
            'artifact_path': 'governance/state/role_cycle_state.json',
            'commit_sha': None,
            'blocker': None,
            'created_at': 'workflow_runtime'
          }
          with path.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
          state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
          state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
          state['cycle_id'] = cycle_id
          state['source'] = {'type': source}
          state['active_role'] = 'curator'
          state['next_role'] = next_role
          state['curator_status'] = 'ASSIGNED'
          state['blocker'] = None
          state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
          PY
      - name: Commit role orchestration result
        shell: bash
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/role_cycle_state.json
          git commit -m "Role orchestrator dispatch ${{ inputs.cycle_id }}" || echo "No changes"
          git push
'''

provider_yaml = '''name: Provider Adapter

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      cycle_id:
        description: Internal role cycle id
        required: true
        type: string
      provider:
        description: file-python-v3
        required: true
        type: string
      role:
        description: analyst, auditor, executor, curator
        required: true
        type: string
      status:
        description: completed or failed
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  adapt:
    name: Provider Adapter file transport
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Append provider adapter result
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          cycle_id = '${{ inputs.cycle_id }}'
          provider = '${{ inputs.provider }}'
          role = '${{ inputs.role }}'
          status = '${{ inputs.status }}'
          path = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
          path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
          blocker = None if status == 'completed' else {'code': 'PROVIDER_FAILED', 'message': 'provider adapter reported failed'}
          record = {
            'record_type': 'provider_adapter_result',
            'cycle_id': cycle_id,
            'source': 'internal',
            'provider': provider,
            'from_role': role,
            'to_role': 'curator',
            'status': status,
            'artifact_path': 'governance/transport/results.jsonl',
            'commit_sha': None,
            'blocker': blocker,
            'created_at': 'workflow_runtime'
          }
          with path.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
          PY
      - name: Commit provider adapter result
        shell: bash
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl
          git commit -m "Provider adapter result ${{ inputs.cycle_id }}" || echo "No changes"
          git push
'''

role_wf.write_text(role_yaml)
provider_wf.write_text(provider_yaml)
changed_files.extend([str(role_wf), str(provider_wf)])

# Audit checks.
checks = {}
for name, text in [('role-orchestrator', role_yaml), ('provider-adapter', provider_yaml)]:
    checks[name+'_workflow_dispatch'] = 'workflow_dispatch' in text
    checks[name+'_no_schedule'] = 'schedule:' not in text
    checks[name+'_no_issue_comment'] = 'issue_comment' not in text
    checks[name+'_ubuntu_latest'] = 'runs-on: ubuntu-latest' in text
    checks[name+'_no_paid_api'] = 'OPENAI_API_KEY' not in text and 'codex exec' not in text
checks['role_curator_first'] = "from_role': 'curator'" in role_yaml or 'from_role": "curator"' in role_yaml
checks['provider_transport_write'] = 'governance/transport/results.jsonl' in provider_yaml
ok = True
for v in checks.values():
    if not v:
        ok = False

report.write_text('# BEM-531.3 | Workflow Audit: Orchestrator + Provider Adapter | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- role-orchestrator.yml normalized to workflow_dispatch only.\n- provider-adapter.yml normalized to workflow_dispatch only.\n- Curator-first routing recorded in role-orchestrator.\n- Provider adapter writes file transport records.\n- No schedule triggers.\n- No issue #31 dependency.\n- No paid OpenAI API.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Archive\nPrevious workflow copies archived under `governance/archive/bem531_3_workflow_audit_20260517/` if they existed.\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'workflow audit checks failed') + '\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-531.3 workflow audit ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '. checks=' + json.dumps(checks, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-531.3 audited and normalized role-orchestrator/provider-adapter workflows')
"""
No issue comments.
